mechanism: R-star uncertainty creates divergent pricing across asset classes (bonds pricing r-star at 1.5-2.0%, equities pricing 0.5-1.0%). This divergence maps directly onto the stock-bond correlation instability as each asset class intermittently reprices toward the other's implicit r-star.
regime_dependence: Active while the Holston-Laubach-Williams 95% CI spans -0.5% to 2.5%. Resolves when r-star estimate narrows or markets converge on a single pricing.
